scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='wrappers/subscription_Subscription.ts';let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');const lines=c.split('\n');let count=0;lines.forEach((l,i)=>{if(l.includes('\"Access denied\"')){count++;if(count===2)lines[i]=l.replace('\"Access denied\"','\"Access denied (owner)\"');}});fs.writeFileSync(f,lines.join('\n'));"
